description: Fix AppHeader layout/overlap issues (issue #5) - improve header text alignment, spacing, and responsive behavior
steps: 1. In src/components/app/CheatingDaddyApp.js, refactor the .live-bar-right styles: add flex-wrap: nowrap, overflow: hidden, text-overflow: ellipsis to prevent text overlap. Add min-width: 0 to allow flex children to shrink.

2. In the .live-bar CSS, change the layout to use a proper 3-column flex with explicit widths: left (flex-shrink:0), center (position:absolute centered), right (flex-shrink:0, margin-left:auto). Ensure the center text does not overlap with left/right by adding max-width and overflow:hidden to .live-bar-center.

3. Add gap between items in .live-bar-right using gap: var(--space-sm) (already there, value is --space-md). Reduce gap to 8px and add white-space: nowrap to all .live-bar-text items to prevent wrapping.
4. Add overflow: hidden and text-overflow: ellipsis to .live-bar-center to handle long profile names.

5. In the renderLiveBar() template, ensure the model info text in .live-bar-right does not grow too wide by capping with max-width or truncating. Add a max-width: 200px and overflow: hidden to the model span.
6. Ensure left/right sections cannot overlap the center by giving them explicit flex-basis or max-width constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Live bar header elements do not overlap each other
Text truncates with ellipsis when space is limited
Left back button, center profile label, and right status indicators are properly spaced
No text wrapping occurs in the live bar
verification: Run 'node -e "require('./src/storage.js')"' from /projects/sandbox/cd to validate main process files parse correctly
Run 'npx prettier --check src/' to verify formatting compliance
findings: Replaced flex+absolute positioning with CSS Grid (grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto) for the live-bar. Removed z-index from left/right sections. Added overflow/ellipsis handling to center and right sections. Reduced gap in right section from --space-md to --space-sm. Added max-width: 180px to live-bar-text items.
